prestazioni: Engine swap to HR15DE (1.5L DOHC 16V) with forged internals: JE 86mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 250+ hp reliability on E85 fuel. Paired with a HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT2560R-5 turbo, 3.5-inch stainless downpipe, and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve) with a custom 3-inch titanium exhaust system by Fujitsubo Giken.

Full bolt-on forced induction setup: Tomei 4-2-1 header (catless), custom intercooler by GReddy (Type-S front-mount, 600x300x76mm core), and a custom ECU tune via Haltech Elite 1500 with flex-fuel sensor and individual cylinder knock control for precise timing on E85.

Suspension overhaul: Tein Flex Z coilovers (N1-spec damping, 32-way adjustable rebound, and 16-way adjustable compression) with Cusco pillowball upper mounts and Whiteline 22mm adjustable rear sway bar. Braking upgraded to Endless CC-RG6 rotors (260mm front, 240mm rear) with AP Racing CP5556 calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom Nismo S-Tune side skirts and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (vented, 30% weight reduction).

OEM+ Nismo aero: S-Tune rear wing (dual-element, 1,200mm span) with adjustable angle, Nismo S-Tune front canards (carbon fiber), and custom 3M 1080 vinyl wrap in Nissan Racing Red (code: AN0) with matte black accents on the roof and mirrors.

Interior: Bride Zeta III seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell) with Takata 4-point harnesses, Nismo S-Tune steering wheel (suede, 350mm diameter), and a custom roll cage by AutoTechnic (6-point, TIG-welded chromoly, bolt-in design with harness bar).
